name: Rick Tyler
subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Daily Message

Dear Friend,

As Ted Cruz travels
the state of New Hampshire, and excites conservatives throughout
the state, Donald Trump continues to appear rattled by people's
commitment to voting for a consistent conservative with a record
they can trust.

Donald Trump has
donated to Democrats, has supported corporate welfare and
enthusiastically supported TARP and Obama's bailouts. He's even
previously expressed his admiration for Hillary Clinton.

Conservatives will
not win with a candidate who's propped up Democrats and the
Washington Cartel. We will win by painting a bold contrast
between the principles that will lead to more freedom,
prosperity, and security and those that will further the status
quo. Now is our time to coalesce behind a candidate who has
always stood for those principles, not someone who panders when
it helps him in the polls.

Best,

Rick Tyler
Communications
Director
www.tedcruz.org

CRUZ NEWS

The Blaze: Mark Levin
Blows Up Over Trump's 'Mindless' Attacks on Cruz: 'I'm Sick and
Tired of Stupid Talk!'

2014

Is Making a Strategic Mistake in the Way He's Going After Cruz

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: Gaining on Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)
Peter, a new poll of likely NH voters is out today that has Gov. John Kasich up to 20% - That's only 7 points behind Trump and twice the support of Rubio, Christie, Cruz and Bush.

This is the fifth recent poll that has Gov. Kasich in second place.

**We're only 21 days from the New Hampshire primary...exactly three weeks from today!**

**Here are two ways you can help right now as we come down the final stretch:**

**1.** Chip in $21 or more to help continue our growing support! [JohnKasich.com/Donate](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32969037:Wh4UcFycN:m:1:958431888:7C45846F11FFF334BF81AE6A8CED1494:r)

**2.** Commit to just one hour (or more) of time to either help on the ground in New Hampshire or make phone calls to rally support for the governor. Sign up at: [JohnKasich.com/Volunteer](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32969038:Wh4UcFycN:m:1:958431888:7C45846F11FFF334BF81AE6A8CED1494:r)

**[Peter - our momentum is real but we need to keep going strong!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32969037:Wh4UcFycN:m:1:958431888:7C45846F11FFF334BF81AE6A8CED1494:r)** Thank you.

Sincerely,

**John Weaver**
Chief Strategist
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32969037:Wh4UcFycN:m:1:958431888:7C45846F11FFF334BF81AE6A8CED1494:r)

P.S. In case you missed the news, Gov. Kasich was endorsed by three major NH newspapers this past weekend and this is the fifth poll that has him at #2 in recent weeks!

| **Friend, as of this morning, my staff informs me that you have not yet activated your CRUZ CREW 2016 exclusive Member Card.**

Is everything alright? It's 2016, and the first votes are set to be cast in Iowa in just days.

As one of my most dedicated conservative supporters, I want to make sure you get your 2016 Early Supporter Iowa edition CRUZ CREW Membership Card BEFORE it's too late.

I want you to be recognized for your early support of my campaign, but you have to act now to secure your card through the exclusive links below.

**[Click here to activate your 2016 Membership today >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32968940:WVa4JFyNn:m:1:1104269936:77D4BAA9E5184378288E0EAD17A6522C:r)**

There are less than two days left to get your Early Supporter Iowa edition CRUZ CREW Membership Card -- pictured below.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32968941:WVa4JFyNn:m:1:1104269936:77D4BAA9E5184378288E0EAD17A6522C:r)

Friend, if you activate your card BEFORE the deadline -- I'll make sure your card reflects that you got in on the ground floor by designating you as an Early Iowa Supporting Member of the CRUZ CREW.

**Only cards activated before midnight on Jan. 21st will have the 2016 Early Supporter mark.**

**[Follow this link to activate your CRUZ CREW Membership with a contribution of $35 or more, and I'll send you your personalized Early Supporter Membership Card immediately.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32968940:WVa4JFyNn:m:1:1104269936:77D4BAA9E5184378288E0EAD17A6522C:r)**

As an Early Supporting Member, you will secure your spot on an exclusive call with senior Cruz for President staff -- talking strategy and laying out the groundwork being done across the country to lock up the nomination.

**Friend, I hope you will keep this card in your wallet and carry it with pride as your token of support for my campaign.**

I'm focused on fighting and winning -- **[uniting the GOP to defeat Hillary.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32968940:WVa4JFyNn:m:1:1104269936:77D4BAA9E5184378288E0EAD17A6522C:r)**

You see, under President Obama's watch:

| 1. | Our enemies have grown stronger and become emboldened -- putting us at great risk both at home and abroad;

---|---
2. | The federal government continues to expand even while the economy grinds to a halt; and

3. | We have lost our liberty to crippling regulations like Obamacare.

You and I must band together to fight the Washington Cartel and Obama's unprecedented expansion of the federal government bureaucracy.

**[Click here -- activate your Early Supporter Membership today >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32968940:WVa4JFyNn:m:1:1104269936:77D4BAA9E5184378288E0EAD17A6522C:r)**

Thank you and God bless!

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

name: Ben Carson
subject: "In God We Trust" under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32969549:sw1MMFygN:m:1:876315805:35CF0F2638557D2D1B7DD0543E58979F:r)
---

Peter,

There they go again...

A group of liberal, atheist progressives in Ohio have filed a lawsuit attempting to remove "In God We Trust" from our nation's currency.

We must stamp out these blatant attempts to trample on our Constitution and whitewash our history. All the way back to our founding, trust in God has been a bedrock principle of our nation and as your President, I will protect the Judeo-Christian values that made us great.

**[Stand with me in defense of our values and our Constitution by signing our petition now.

](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32969549:sw1MMFygN:m:1:876315805:35CF0F2638557D2D1B7DD0543E58979F:r)**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32969549:sw1MMFygN:m:1:876315805:35CF0F2638557D2D1B7DD0543E58979F:r)
---
There was a time in America when a lawsuit like this would be laughed off, but that was before out-of-control political correctness had infiltrated every aspect of our culture.

If we kowtow to the PC police and cease to defend the values that made us great, we will lose what made us special, and I refuse to let that happen.

Thank you, and [I hope you will join me by signing our petition now.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32969549:sw1MMFygN:m:1:876315805:35CF0F2638557D2D1B7DD0543E58979F:r)

Sincerely,

name: Cliff Maloney Jr.
subject: How we win Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
Did you know it could take as few as 20,000
votes to win the Iowa Caucus in 2016?
There are at least fourteen candidates
running for President in Iowa and there are usually around
120,000 caucus votes.
Ron Paul shocked the world when he got 26,036
votes for 21.4% of the vote in the 2012. That would almost
certainly be enough votes to win the caucuses in 2016 because
there are far more candidates running and therefore the number of
votes will be more divided up among the candidates.
What is the secret to overperforming in the
Iowa Caucus? The Youth Vote.
Ron Paul received a record number of youth
votes in 2012 and the youth turnout in 2016 is estimated to be
much higher. Why? Because in 2012 colleges were NOT in session
at the time of the Iowa Caucus because it was held during winter
break.
This year the Iowa Caucuses will be held on
February 1st with students on campus and geared up to
participate!
Students love Rand Paul.
Students agree with Rand Paul on privacy.
Students agree with Rand Paul that our sons
and daughters shouldn't be sent to die on the battlefields of the
Middle East.
Students agree with Rand Paul that we need to
get our debt under control, and change our taxation policies.
Rand Paul has by far the strongest youth
organization in Iowa and across the country and is busy
organizing for the Iowa Caucuses.
How do we win the youth vote? Say hello to
"The Iowa 10,000!" It's our goal to have 10,000 students show up
at the Iowa Caucus for Rand!
It would shock the media and the
establishment because students don't show up in the polling data.
They aren't on the historical voter lists. And they don't have
landlines to answer telephone polls.
We are thrilled to tell you that we are
halfway to our goal. We recently reached our 5,000th student
pledge to attend the Iowa Caucus for Rand. And we believe we are
well on our way to hitting the magic number 10,000. But we need
your help.
The final step to our project is the Caucus
Takeover Get-Out-The-Vote program here in Iowa. We will have
hundreds of student leaders deploying from around the nation to
sacrifice their time and talents to mobilize 10,000 college
students.
We need to buy pizza, gasoline, membership
tables, and other tools of recruitment to fund the entire "Caucus
Takeover" project and ensure a victory for Rand Paul.
Recently, we reached 5,000 pledges for
Students for Rand in Iowa and it's only the beginning.
With your help -- we can make sure that Rand
Paul wins the youth vote and wins Iowa.
So we are setting a goal of raising $100,000
in the next 96 HOURS to fund "The Caucus Takeover." Thats right,
we believe that if we can raise $100,000 to take our student
operation to the next level then we can hit the magic number of
10,000 students caucusing for Rand Paul in the Iowa Caucus.
Recruiting the 10,000 students would give
Rand an extra boost in the polls. It would be enough to make the
difference in this campaign and truly shock the world.
By donating to today, you can help us
continue our movement to recruit students and make a real
difference in the election. For every student you sponsor you
will cover the cost of food, housing, and transportation for the
ENTIRE 10 day project.

$100 TO SPONSOR 1
STUDENT >>

$200 TO SPONSOR 2
STUDENTS >>

$300 TO SPONSOR 3
STUDENTS >>

$400 TO SPONSOR 4
STUDENTS >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Thanks for all of your help.

In Liberty,
Cliff Maloney Jr.
National Youth Director
Rand Paul for President

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Fair-Elections@KatieMcGinty.com
subject: Your signature needed to end gerrymandering
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend,
For too long, gerrymandering has allowed politicians to manipulate the lines of electoral boundaries to help them win elections. This has had such a huge impact on the way we choose our leaders that President Obama addressed it in his final State of the Union. "Redrawing the lines" is a betrayal of our democracy and an abuse of power by politicians who want nothing more than to unfairly tip the scales. If we want fair elections, we need to stop redrawing the lines to benefit politicians and instead respect the people's voices. [**Sign your name to stand up against gerrymandering and support fair elections >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3578334092648775680/-4529191860018610176?ms=20160119&refcode=e20160119&refcode2=e20160119nd&amount=5) Out of all the states in the union, Pennsylvania is arguably one of the most impacted, with our Congressional districts drawn in such a way as to completely distort the goal of one person, one vote. Nonpartisan redistricting is essential to preserving fairness and representation in our democracy. We need electoral districts that accurately reflect the will of the people, not ones that egregiously skewer the results to give one party more power in exerting their will. [**Americans should have a vote that counts. Sign your name to reduce the impact of partisan politics on our democracy >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3578334092648775680/-4529191860018610176?ms=20160119&refcode=e20160119&refcode2=e20160119nd&amount=5)
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3578334092648775680/-4457134265980682240?refcode=e20160119&refcode2=e20160119nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

name: Rand Paul
subject: They're missing it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot, It may end up being the biggest story of the entire Iowa Caucuses. Yet, few in our national media have even bothered to take a look at my campaign's growing strength among Iowa's young people. **We just reached record numbers of student pledges to attend the Iowa Caucuses for me!** [I'm counting on you to help me keep up our momentum with a generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away to help us fund our $100,000 Caucus Takeover Get-Out-The-Vote operation.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32977621:W5U3TeyMN:m:1:879035888:91110869C819B518DC11728AB3D15019:r) With only two weeks left before the voting begins, your immediate support is absolutely critical. Of course, as we've seen time and time again, young people have played a big role in determining Democrat presidential nominees. **Now, in 2016, I'm counting on young people to be a central part of my "Leave Me Alone" coalition.** The truth is, no other Republican candidate is even bothering to campaign for young people's votes. Not one. That's because these young voters agree me with me on issues like the Fourth Amendment. They agree with me on keeping the United States out of nation-building and other foreign policy blunders in the Middle East. They agree with me on tackling our growing national debt -- which they're going to get stuck with. My Republican opponents know they don't have anything to offer young voters -- nothing but the status quo. Also, many of these younger voters don't respond to traditional polling. In fact, I've yet to meet a single student in Iowa who has been polled! It's not hard to understand why. Most of them don't have landlines, few if any show up on traditional voter lists and they're much harder to reach than many other voters who watch the nightly news day-in and day-out. With our phone banks and our Students for Rand campus operations, my campaign can reach them. But only if we have the resources. Patriot, I'm counting on you to help. **Time is running out until February 1.** It's absolutely critical we fully fund our $100,000 in the next 96 hours for the Caucus Takeover Get-Out-The-Vote operation as soon as possible. [So please agree to your most generous contribution to help us reach this goal.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32977622:W5U3TeyMN:m:1:879035888:91110869C819B518DC11728AB3D15019:r) Please be as generous as you can! name: Chairman Matt Borges
subject: FW: Ted Strickland's Record
body:
| Peter --

[Have you seen the new web ad, "Record," from the Portman campaign?](http://www.robportman.com/worse_governor_or_congressman?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_blast2&n=1)

Ted Strickland has been hiding from his record -- he's even been called "invisible" by the media and members of his own party. With his record, who can blame him for hiding from Ohio voters? During his term as governor, Ohio lost over 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation. Before that, he failed to pass a single bill into law in Congress and ranked as one of the most ineffective and absent members of Congress.

2016 is going to be a tough election, but the Portman team is prepared! Please make sure you [watch the new web ad](http://www.robportman.com/worse_governor_or_congressman?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_blast2&n=2) and forward it to 10 of your friends -- we cannot afford to let Retread Ted Strickland take Ohio backwards again!

Sincerely,

Matt Borges

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Corry Bliss <corrybliss@robportman.com>
Date: Thu, Jan 14, 2016 at 10:10 AM
Subject: Ted Strickland's Record
To: Matt Borges <mborges@robportman.com>

[](http://www.robportman.com/worse_governor_or_congressman?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_blast2&n=3) Matt -- I wanted you to be among the first to see "Record," [our new web ad](http://www.robportman.com/worse_governor_or_congressman?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_blast2&n=4)!

We know why Ted Strickland's campaign has been called "invisible" by the media -- he's hiding from his record! Ted Strickland failed as Governor of Ohio when the state lost over 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation, but he also failed Ohio as a Congressman when he sponsored zero bills that became law and was ranked as one of the most ineffective and absent members of Congress. Please watch our new web ad and [vote whether you think Ted Strickland was a worse congressman or a worse governor!](http://www.robportman.com/worse_governor_or_congressman?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_blast2&n=6) Sincerely, Corry Bliss [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_blast2&n=7)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_blast2&n=8)[

subject: Friend, will you have our back?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend,

Did you watch last week’s Republican Presidential Debate? If so, you watched my husband deliver one of his most powerful debates, yet. I was so moved to watch him fight with passion for our country. He stood on that stage and fought against this current Iran deal which threatens our nation’s security in so many ways. I am proud that he would tear this deal up on DAY ONE of being in office. He stood on that stage and fought for government policies that will build our families up not continue to tear them down. And from that stage, he asked all the Cadets from The Citadel, including our two sons, to stand up while he thanked them, from the heart, for their willingness to serve & protect our country. And from that stage, He promised them and everyone serving this country today — that he has their back! _Friend, he has your back!_ That debate, as I watched it, was not about him. It was not about Rick Santorum. It was about all of us. I heard him fighting for you. Your family. Your security. And fearlessly fighting for your values. The values we so dearly share. The left has been merciless to our family. The attacks are vicious and disgusting. You only have to Google his name to see how much they fear and hate him. Even in the midst of all these attacks, though, I promise you — he won’t back down because there is too much on the line. He will have your back in this fight for the future of our country. Can I count on you to have Rick’s back? [**Friend, please give $25 to support this campaign!**](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum%3Fsc%3Dkaren_back&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=karen_back&n=1) He has never given up in this fight and we know you haven't either. Together, let us continue to make the sacrifices to bring strength and security to our beloved country. **[Thank you for your help so far. Your support has made it possible for Rick to represent your voice as he travels across the nation. And once again, I ask you to please give what you can ..... $25, $50, $100 or more to help him fight for your values and all that we hold dear.

](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum2016%3Fsc%3Dkaren_back&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=karen_back&n=2)** With gratitude, Karen

subject: My sister needs us to have her back
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:

Friend --
Our family was always busy with ten kids running around, but my sister Katie looked out for me as the youngest, making sure I got my fair share and nobody pushed me around. Now, Katie is looking out for the interests of other families, and that's why I'm doing everything I can to help my sister get elected to the U.S. Senate - so that she can go to Washington and fight for other people's chance to have their fair share, too. **Katie 's opponents are getting ready to launch big attacks against her as we head into the final stretch of this campaign.** As the sister she always stood up for, I can't stand by and allow that to go unchallenged. I've given what I can, but Katie's going to need _your_ help, too, if she's going to have the resources she needs to fight back. [**Chip in just $5 right now to make sure Katie can withstand these aggressive attacks and continue fighting for us.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3975490886741000192/-3015419435268702208?refcode=e20160119.2&refcode2=e20160119.2nd&amount=5) Our families need Katie in Washington, making sure our daughters will be paid the same salary as our sons for the same work, and that Social Security will be there for us when we're ready to pass the torch onto younger workers. But there are fewer than 100 days left in this campaign, and Katie's opponents are going into attack mode any day now. [**Contribute just $5 right away so that Katie has what she needs to fight back, win this election, and go to Washington to stand up for families like yours and mine.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3975490886741000192/-3015419435268702208?refcode=e20160119.2&refcode2=e20160119.2nd&amount=5) Thanks for having her back,
Colleen Maguire

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Goldman Sachs funding Clinton ads in Iowa
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
For the first time in this race, one of the super PACs supporting Hillary Clinton's campaign has placed a "six-figure" ad buy in Iowa, putting its thumb on the scale in her favor less than two weeks before the caucuses.
The super PAC is predictably funded by a number of millionaires and billionaires, including a former Goldman Sachs executive who "pioneered the trades that allowed the mega-bank to profit from the collapse of the housing market."
Our campaign doesn't have a super PAC. We are backed by more than 2.5 million individual small-dollar contributions and the largest volunteer operation in the race. And we've put ourselves in a position where we could overtake the Clinton campaign in Iowa. It'd be a tremendous shame if a super PAC is what took down Bernie in these closing days.
[**Make a $3 contribution to our political revolution and we will do what everyone once thought was impossible: win in Iowa.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a80/43f17890/42df6a18/620ecb16/1752982428/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/think-big?refcode=em160119send-2")
The economic and political systems in this country are stacked against ordinary Americans. The rich get richer and use their wealth to buy elections. But for the first time, we're building an organization with the power to fight back, and that has them terrified.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
